title: Minecraft Trailer
description:
Minecraft as the trailer, it's a new view on the game, the textures, the changes make it a fresh nice experience like the one in the trailer.

So, what are YOU waiting for, start playing NOW
body:
It simply makes the game look like the clean nice minecraft in the trailer. This modpack look and feel like minecraft trailer. Maybe even better, with the help of mods and resource packs we were able to craft this modpack that will give a different perspective on minecraft 
Just try it, YOU will love it.
